target_statement.name: CHRONOS_GRAVITY_STACK_BINDING_SOUNDNESS_LEMMA
target_statement.form: If each bound source-map object is admitted only through its declared stack slot and every downstream theorem reads only declared slot predicates, then source-map integration is structurally admissible as a Chronos gravity stack input.
